name: c-cleanup-scaffold
description: Scaffolds free(...) for direct allocations and for caller-owned helper functions that return allocated memory.

commands.title: C Cleanup Scaffold: Refresh Current Document

cCleanupScaffold.enabled.description: Enable automatic cleanup scaffolding for C/C++.

cCleanupScaffold.detectOwnedReturnFuncti.description: Detect helper functions that allocate and return owned memory, then scaffold free(...) at call sites instead of inside the helper.

cCleanupScaffold.allocatorFunctions.description: Function names treated as allocation sources.

cCleanupScaffold.cleanupFunctionName.description: Cleanup function inserted for owned heap memory.
